name: Embrace Technology

abilities.name: Mechanical Muscle
abilities.text: When this model declares an action, if it has a Shielded token, it may add +(+) to its duel total.

abilities.name: In the Shadow of My Creation
abilities.text: If this model ends its activation within 3" of a friendly Lost Technology marker, it may heal 1 and may gain a Shielded token.

actions.name: (1)(t) Engage Failsafe
actions.effects: Make a Lost Technology marker within range. Then, enemy models within (t)2" of the made marker must pass a TN 12 Wp duel or gain a Staggered token.

extraction_notes: The action symbol (1)(t) appears to represent 1 Action Point and a Tome suit requirement
